name: Insurance denied my construction back injury claim—now what?
description: Appeal fast + prove aggravation; check third-parties.[2][5]

mainEntity.name: Insurance denied my construction back injury claim—now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal fast + prove aggravation; check third-parties.[2][5]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal the denial within deadlines and pursue third-party negligence if applicable.** Utah/Idaho denials often stem from 'pre-existing' arguments; appeals succeed with proof.[2][5] Key factors: (1) Deadlines ~20-60 days; (2) gather more medicals showing aggravation; (3) third-party like faulty equipment separate; (4) fault rules apply.[1] File appeal forms, get independent exam, hire lawyer for hearings. Persistence overturns most wrongful denials.
